news.title_zh: Solana 生态 DeFi 锁仓量周涨12%
news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: 据 DeFiLlama 数据，Solana 生态总锁仓量（TVL）本周上涨12%，主因新晋去中心化交易所（DEX）交易量增长。
news.summary_en: Solana's total DeFi TVL increased 12% this week, driven by rising trading volume on new decentralized exchanges, per DeFiLlama.

news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队公布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将提升智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, with enhanced smart contract expressiveness and lower fees.

news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism，扩展其跨链能力。
news.summary_en: Chainlink CCIP now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its cross-chain interoperability capabilities for developers.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币核心开发者提议ZK-Rollup Layer2方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Devs Propose ZK-Rollup Layer2 Solution
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会发布草案，计划引入基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2扩容方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution to reduce fees for micro-transactions.
